description: Codeberg is a collaborative software development hosting service for Git repositories, issues, pull requests, releases, and related project workflows. Its documentation indicates the platform is built on Forgejo and also offers related services such as CI, Pages, and translation tooling.
summary: Codeberg exposes a Forgejo-based REST API at `https://codeberg.org/api/v1`, documented via Swagger UI, authenticated with user-generated personal access tokens; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or first-party CLI surface was found on codeberg.org.
